top_signals.title: Bond Market Reacts Cautiously to Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Kelsey Berro, Fixed Income Portfolio Manager at JPMorgan Asset Management, discussed the bond market's response following the recent Iran deal. While there is somewhat more clarity compared to earlier in the week, investors are awaiting the full text of the agreement to fully assess its implications. Despite a significant drop in oil prices, Treasury yields have declined only modestly, reflecting caution due to upcoming event risks, particularly the Federal Reserve's policy decisions. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: UK social media ban blow to sports rights holders using TikTok and YouTube
top_signals.summary: The UK’s incoming social media ban for under-16s will be a blow to sports rights holders and wider marketing strategies, experts have warned. The government on Monday announced that there will be a ban on social media for those aged 16 and under from next year – covering the likes of X, TikTok, Twitch and [...]

top_signals.title: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
top_signals.summary: Fox, the owner of the news and sports networks, said it has reached a deal to acquire Roku for about $22 billion in enterprise value.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jim Paulsen Says Wall Street Traders Miss Lingering Policy Risks
top_signals.summary: No matter how rosy Wall Street’s expectations on the economy have been lately, they generally underestimated the reality, supporting risk-on moods that propelled the stock market advance. That pillar of support may be dwindling soon.

top_signals.title: NYK, Yanmar and ENEOS to Deploy Hydrogen Fuel Cell System on New Cruise Ship
top_signals.summary: NYK, Yanmar Power Solutions and ENEOS have agreed to install a hydrogen fuel cell system on a new dining cruise vessel scheduled to enter service in 2027, as the companies seek to advance the use of hydrogen in the maritime sector.The vessel will replace Lady Crystal…
